# 2026-04-16 08:03:31Z

<!-- cursoride Session 8bddf84d-c862-49a3-8031-c84db269f23d (2026-04-16 08:03:31Z) -->

_**User**_

Create detail screen for contents using stack navigation. Detail screen don't have bottom navigation. Please consider below points -

1. On top header show back arrow top-left and  share icon top-right (placeholder — no action required)

2. Show backdrop full-width image, ~220px tall and bottom 40% gradient fade to surface (#131313) so title flows naturally below

3. Title should be display-md Manrope, on_surface, below the hero image

4. Show metadata chips just below the title and these chicps are not scrollable and have surface_container_highest background, on_surface_variant text, label-sm. Also handle all edge cases to show the chips. Ex. if data empty or null then don't show that chip

5. Show Add to Watchlist button below metadata chips. States would be -
Default: full-width, primary gradient (#FFB3AE → #FF5351), bookmark-plus icon, "Add to Watchlist", title-sm Inter Semi-Bold
Added: full-width, surface_container_highest background, outline_variant border at 15% opacity, primary_container bookmark icon, "In Watchlist"
Toggle is immediate and optimistic — update UI before AsyncStorage confirms

6. Below Add to watchlist button show synopsis text with Synopsis" label (headline-md). text should be body-md, on_surface, truncated to 3 lines. If text is large the show read more button which will show full text with animation.

7. Below Synopsis show cast section Cast Section with label "Cast"  (headline-md) Horizontal scroll of circular avatar cards: 60px diameter image, actor name label-sm on_surface, character name label-sm on_surface_variant

8.  Below cast show "More Like This" (headline-md) + "See All" right-aligned
Horizontal scroll of standard portrait content cards. Use @src/components/common/ContentCard.tsx without metadata. Only title will be visible and card size should be small so that 2 full and 1 hafl card will be visible on the screen.

Use these three API calls to fetch all data on detail screen -
Movie details	/movie/{id}	Title, backdrop, metadata chips, synopsis
Credits	/movie/{id}/credits	Cast section
Similar titles	/movie/{id}/similar	More Like This section

All three APIs must be initiated simultaneously using Promise.allSettled

Attached UI for reference. UI should be look similar to yhe given UI.

Full folder tree of &#96;src/&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nsrc/\\\\n├── api/\\\\n│   ├── client.ts\\\\n│   ├── movies.ts\\\\n│   └── types.ts\\\\n├── components/\\\\n│   ├── common/\\\\n│   │   └── ContentCard.tsx\\\\n│   └── home/\\\\n│       ├── GenreChipStrip.tsx\\\\n│       ├── HeroFeaturedCard.tsx\\\\n│       ├── HomeHeader.tsx\\\\n│       ├── HomeLoadingFooter.tsx\\\\n│       ├── homeLayout.ts\\\\n│       └── MovieRow.tsx\\\\n├── hooks/\\\\n│   ├── types.ts\\\\n│   ├── useDisplayGenres.ts\\\\n│   ├── useMovieDetail.ts\\\\n│   ├── usePaginatedMovies.ts\\\\n│   ├── useRecentSearches.ts\\\\n│   └── useSearch.ts\\\\n├── navigation/\\\\n│   ├── RootNavigator.tsx\\\\n│   └── types.ts\\\\n├── screens/\\\\n│   ├── DetailScreen.tsx\\\\n│   ├── HomeScreen.tsx\\\\n│   ├── MovieListScreen.tsx\\\\n│   ├── ProfileScreen.tsx\\\\n│   ├── SearchScreen.tsx\\\\n│   └── WatchlistScreen.tsx\\\\n├── store/\\\\n│   └── watchlistStore.ts\\\\n├── theme/\\\\n│   ├── colors.ts\\\\n│   ├── spacing.ts\\\\n│   └── typography.ts\\\\n├── types/\\\\n│   └── env.d.ts\\\\n└── utils/\\\\n    ├── chunkPairs.ts\\\\n    ├── displayGenres.ts\\\\n    ├── image.ts\\\\n    └── movieDisplay.ts\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Navigation setup (summary)\\\\n\\\\n- **Entry:** &#96;App.tsx&#96; wraps the app in &#96;SafeAreaProvider&#96;, sets &#96;StatusBar&#96;, and uses &#96;NavigationContainer&#96; with a dark theme aligned to &#96;colors&#96;, then renders &#96;RootNavigator&#96;.\\\\n- **Structure:** A **native stack** (&#96;RootStackParamList&#96;) with:\\\\n  - &#96;Tabs&#96; → bottom tab navigator (&#96;RootTabParamList&#96;: Home, Search, Watchlist, Profile)\\\\n  - &#96;MovieList&#96; (stack, header shown with title from params)\\\\n  - &#96;Detail&#96; (stack, no header)\\\\n- **Types:** &#96;src/navigation/types.ts&#96; defines &#96;RootTabParamList&#96;, &#96;RootStackParamList&#96;, &#96;MovieListMode&#96;, and augments &#96;ReactNavigation.RootParamList&#96; for global typing.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Screen patterns (brief)\\\\n\\\\n- **Screens live under** &#96;src/screens/&#96;: &#96;HomeScreen&#96;, &#96;SearchScreen&#96;, &#96;WatchlistScreen&#96;, &#96;ProfileScreen&#96;, &#96;MovieListScreen&#96;, &#96;DetailScreen&#96;.\\\\n- **Data:** &#96;HomeScreen&#96; and &#96;DetailScreen&#96; use **custom hooks** (&#96;usePaginated*&#96;, &#96;useDisplayGenres&#96;, &#96;useMovieDetail&#96;) rather than inline &#96;fetch&#96; in the screen.\\\\n- **Navigation:** Home gets the stack navigator via &#96;navigation.getParent\u003cNativeStackNavigationProp\u003cRootStackParamList\u003e\u003e()&#96; and calls &#96;navigate('Detail', {movieId})&#96; / &#96;navigate('MovieList', ...)&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. API client and hooks\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;client.ts&#96;:** Single Axios instance with &#96;TMDB_BASE_URL&#96;, bearer token from &#96;@env&#96;, 15s timeout, response interceptor that retries once on network failure, and errors normalized to &#96;ApiClientError&#96; via &#96;toApiClientError&#96;.\\\\n- **&#96;movies.ts&#96;:** All TMDB calls use &#96;import client from './client'&#96; and export async functions (&#96;getTrending&#96;, &#96;getTopRated&#96;, &#96;getMovieDetail&#96;, etc.).\\\\n- **Hooks:** e.g. &#96;useMovieDetail&#96; imports &#96;getMovieDetail&#96; from &#96;../api/movies&#96; and &#96;ApiClientError&#96; from &#96;../api/client&#96;; it does **not** import Axios directly.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Watchlist store\\\\n\\\\n- Zustand &#96;create&#96; + &#96;persist&#96; with &#96;AsyncStorage&#96; (&#96;createJSONStorage&#96;), key &#96;streamlist-watchlist&#96;.\\\\n- State: &#96;items: Movie[]&#96;, &#96;addToWatchlist&#96;, &#96;removeFromWatchlist&#96;, &#96;isInWatchlist&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. &#96;ContentCard&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- Poster via &#96;getImageUrl(posterPath, 'w500')&#96;, optional rating badge, title + optional subtitle, &#96;Pressable&#96; with opacity press state, theme tokens for colors/spacing/typography, &#96;React.memo&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. Theme files\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;colors.ts&#96;:** Surface/primary/on-surface tokens and UI chrome (tab bar, header, chips, scrims).\\\\n- **&#96;spacing.ts&#96;:** &#96;spacing&#96; scale + &#96;radius.pill&#96;.\\\\n- **&#96;typography.ts&#96;:** Named text styles (&#96;display_lg&#96; … &#96;chip_label&#96;) with explicit font families.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\nBelow are the **full contents** you asked for (paths are workspace-relative from repo root).\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;App.tsx&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;1:37:/home/shubham/Streamlist/StreamList/App.tsx\\\\nimport React from <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me create a comprehensive plan for the Detail screen implementation.

Key observations:
1. `DetailScreen.tsx` already exists with a basic implementation - needs to be completely revamped
2. `useMovieDetail.ts` exists but only fetches movie details, not credits or similar movies
3. Navigation types already have `Detail: {movieId: number}` - good
4. The Detail screen is already registered in the stack navigator with `headerShown: false`
5. Need to add API functions for credits and similar movies


6. I'll need to define types for cast members and the credits response structure
7. There's a type mismatch between the watchlist's `Movie` type and the detail screen's `MovieDetail` that I'll need to reconcile
8. The gradient and icon libraries are already available, so I can use those directly
9. My implementation plan involves adding the new types to the API layer, creating the API functions for fetching credits and similar movies, and then rewriting the hook to pull all this data together with `Promise.allSettled`

For the detail screen layout, I'm picturing a scrollable view with the backdrop and gradient at the top, followed by the title and metadata chips, then the watchlist button, synopsis, cast section, and similar movies section below. When adding to the watchlist, I'll convert the `MovieDetail` object into a `Movie` object that matches what the store expects.</details></think>

  "plan": "# Movie Detail Screen\n\n## Current State\n\n- [&#96;src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx) exists as a bare placeholder (title + tagline + overview only).\n- [&#96;src/hooks/useMovieDetail.ts&#96;](src/hooks/useMovieDetail.ts) fetches only &#96;/movie/{id}&#96; -- credits and similar are not called.\n- Navigation is already wired: &#96;Detail&#96; route with &#96;{movieId: number}&#96; params, &#96;headerShown: false&#96; in the stack navigator, no bottom tabs.\n- [&#96;src/api/movies.ts&#96;](src/api/movies.ts) has &#96;getMovieDetail&#96; but no credits or similar functions.\n- [&#96;src/api/types.ts&#96;](src/api/types.ts) has &#96;MovieDetail&#96; and &#96;Movie&#96; but no credits types.\n- &#96;react-native-linear-gradient&#96; and &#96;react-native-vector-icons&#96; are already installed.\n\n---\n\n## Changes Required\n\n### 1. Add API types for credits and similar responses\n\n**File:** [&#96;src/api/types.ts&#96;](src/api/types.ts)\n\nAdd &#96;CastMember&#96; and &#96;CreditsResponse&#96; interfaces:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nexport interface CastMember {\n  id: number;\n  name: string;\n  character: string;\n  profile_path: string | null;\n  order: number;\n}\n\nexport interface CreditsResponse {\n  id: number;\n  cast: CastMember[];\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. Add API functions for credits and similar\n\n**File:** [&#96;src/api/movies.ts&#96;](src/api/movies.ts)\n\nAdd two new exported functions:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nexport async function getMovieCredits(movieId: number): Promise\u003cCreditsResponse\u003e {\n  const { data } = await client.get\u003cCreditsResponse\u003e(&#96;/movie/${movieId}/credits&#96;);\n  return data;\n}\n\nexport async function getSimilarMovies(movieId: number): Promise\u003cPaginatedResponse\u003cMovie\u003e\u003e {\n  const { data } = await client.get\u003cPaginatedResponse\u003cMovie\u003e\u003e(&#96;/movie/${movieId}/similar&#96;);\n  return data;\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. Rewrite the detail hook with Promise.allSettled\n\n**File:** [&#96;src/hooks/useMovieDetail.ts&#96;](src/hooks/useMovieDetail.ts)\n\n- Fire all three API calls simultaneously via &#96;Promise.allSettled&#96;.\n- Return &#96;{ detail, cast, similar, loading, error, refetch }&#96;.\n- Each section is independently nullable so the UI can gracefully render whatever succeeded.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\ninterface DetailData {\n  detail: MovieDetail | null;\n  cast: CastMember[];\n  similar: Movie[];\n}\n\nexport function useMovieDetail(movieId: number): UseQueryResult\u003cDetailData\u003e { ... }\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4. Rewrite the Detail screen\n\n**File:** [&#96;src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx)\n\nFull rewrite as a &#96;ScrollView&#96; with the following sections top-to-bottom:\n\n**a) Floating header** -- absolute-positioned row over the backdrop: back arrow (Ionicons &#96;chevron-back&#96;) top-left navigates back, share icon (Ionicons &#96;share-outline&#96;) top-right (placeholder, no action). Uses &#96;useSafeAreaInsets&#96; for top padding.\n\n**b) Backdrop hero** -- Full-width &#96;Image&#96; ~220px tall. A &#96;LinearGradient&#96; overlay covers the bottom ~40% fading from transparent to &#96;colors.surface&#96; (#131313 equivalent, but using the token &#96;colors.surface&#96; which is &#96;#0C0C0C&#96;). Per the design rules, surface is &#96;#0C0C0C&#96;, so we use the surface token.\n\n**c) Title** -- &#96;typography.display_md&#96; (Manrope ExtraBold 40), &#96;colors.on_surface&#96;.\n\n**d) Metadata chips** -- Horizontal non-scrollable row of chips (wrapped in &#96;flexWrap: 'wrap'&#96;):\n  - Year (from &#96;release_date&#96;) -- skip if empty/null\n  - Rating (\"X.X Rating\" with star icon) -- skip if &#96;vote_average&#96; is 0 or null\n  - Genre (first genre name) -- skip if &#96;genres&#96; array empty\n  - Runtime (\"Xh Ym\") -- skip if &#96;runtime&#96; is null or 0\n  - Each chip: &#96;colors.surface_container_highest&#96; background, &#96;colors.on_surface_variant&#96; text, &#96;typography.label_sm&#96;, rounded corners.\n\n**e) Watchlist button** -- Two states:\n  - Default: full-width, gradient background (&#96;#FFB3AE&#96; -\u003e &#96;#FF5351&#96; via &#96;LinearGradient&#96;), bookmark-plus icon, \"Add to Watchlist\", &#96;typography.title_sm&#96;.\n  - Added: full-width, &#96;colors.surface_container_highest&#96; background, &#96;colors.outline_variant&#96; border at 15% opacity, &#96;colors.primary_container&#96; bookmark icon, \"In Watchlist\".\n  - Uses &#96;useWatchlistStore&#96; for optimistic toggle. Need to convert &#96;MovieDetail&#96; to &#96;Movie&#96; for the store (map &#96;genres&#96; to &#96;genre_ids&#96;).\n\n**f) Synopsis** -- \"Synopsis\" label (&#96;typography.headline_md&#96;), overview text (&#96;typography.body_md&#96;, &#96;colors.on_surface&#96;), truncated to 3 lines with \"Read More\" / \"Show Less\" toggle that animates height using &#96;LayoutAnimation&#96;.\n\n**g) Cast** -- \"Cast\" label (&#96;typography.headline_md&#96;), horizontal &#96;FlatList&#96; of circular avatar cards: 60px diameter image, actor name (&#96;typography.label_sm&#96;, &#96;colors.on_surface&#96;), character name (&#96;typography.label_sm&#96;, &#96;colors.on_surface_variant&#96;). Use &#96;getImageUrl(profile_path, 'w185')&#96; for avatar.\n\n**h) More Like This** -- \"More Like This\" + \"See All\" right-aligned (&#96;typography.headline_md&#96;). Horizontal &#96;FlatList&#96; using &#96;ContentCard&#96; from [&#96;src/components/common/ContentCard.tsx&#96;](src/components/common/ContentCard.tsx) without metadata (no rating, no subtitle). Card width calculated so 2.5 cards are visible on screen. \"See All\" is a placeholder (no navigation target needed per requirements). Pressing a card navigates to &#96;Detail&#96; with that movie's ID.\n\n### 5. No navigation changes needed\n\nThe &#96;Detail&#96; route is already registered in [&#96;src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx&#96;](src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx) with &#96;headerShown: false&#96; (default from the stack's &#96;screenOptions&#96;). Bottom tabs are absent because &#96;Detail&#96; sits in the root stack, not inside the tab navigator.\n\n---\n\n## Data Flow\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TD\n    DetailScreen --\u003e|\"movieId\"| useMovieDetail\n    useMovieDetail --\u003e|\"Promise.allSettled\"| allSettled[\"Promise.allSettled\"]\n    allSettled --\u003e getMovieDetail[\"/movie/{id}\"]\n    allSettled --\u003e getMovieCredits[\"/movie/{id}/credits\"]\n    allSettled --\u003e getSimilarMovies[\"/movie/{id}/similar\"]\n    getMovieDetail --\u003e detail[\"MovieDetail\"]\n    getMovieCredits --\u003e cast[\"CastMember[]\"]\n    getSimilarMovies --\u003e similar[\"Movie[]\"]\n    detail --\u003e DetailScreen\n    cast --\u003e DetailScreen\n    similar --\u003e DetailScreen\n    DetailScreen --\u003e|\"toggle\"| useWatchlistStore\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking)**_

All tasks are complete. Here's a summary of what changed and why:

---

### What changed

**1. `src/api/types.ts`** -- Added `CastMember` and `CreditsResponse` interfaces to type the `/movie/{id}/credits` endpoint response (cast member id, name, character, profile_path, order).

**2. `src/api/movies.ts`** -- Added two new API functions:
- `getMovieCredits(movieId)` -- calls `/movie/{id}/credits`
- `getSimilarMovies(movieId)` -- calls `/movie/{id}/similar`

Both route through the shared `client` instance (no direct Axios imports).

**3. `src/hooks/useMovieDetail.ts`** -- Rewrote the hook to fire all three API calls (`getMovieDetail`, `getMovieCredits`, `getSimilarMovies`) simultaneously via `Promise.allSettled`. The detail endpoint is required (failure = error state), while credits and similar degrade gracefully to empty arrays if they fail. Returns `{ detail, cast, similar }` in the data object.

**4. `src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx`** -- Complete rewrite with these sections:
- **Floating header** -- Back arrow (navigates back) and share icon (placeholder) over the backdrop, safe-area-aware
- **Backdrop hero** -- Full-width 220px image with a `LinearGradient` fading the bottom 40% to `colors.surface`
- **Title** -- `display_md` Manrope below the hero
- **Metadata chips** -- Non-scrollable row with year, rating (star + value), first genre, and runtime. Each chip uses `surface_container_highest` bg / `on_surface_variant` text / `label_sm`. Null/empty values are skipped
- **Watchlist button** -- Two states: gradient CTA (`#FFB3AE` -> `#FF5351`) for default, `surface_container_highest` with `outline_variant` border for added. Optimistic toggle via Zustand store, with `MovieDetail` -> `Movie` conversion

| Area | Before | After (matching HTML) |
|---|---|---|

| **Horizontal padding** | 16px (`spacing.md`) everywhere | 24px (`spacing.xl`) — matches HTML's `px-6` |
| **Chips bg** | `surface_container_highest` | `surface_container_high` — matches HTML's `bg-surface-container-high` |
| **Chips gap** | 8px | 12px (`spacing.sm`) — matches `gap-3` |
| **Rating chip** | Same style as regular chips | Distinct: `rating_chip_bg` bg, filled star icon, `primary_cta` text, bold weight |
| **Watchlist gradient** | Left-to-right | Top-left to bottom-right — matches `bg-gradient-to-br` |
| **In Watchlist state** | Filled `surface_container_highest` bg | Outlined: `primary` border + `primary` text, transparent bg |
| **Section titles** | `headline_md` (28px) | `title_lg` + `fontWeight: '700'` (~20px bold) — matches `text-lg font-bold` |
| **Synopsis text** | `on_surface` (white) | `on_surface_variant` — matches HTML's `text-on-surface-variant` |
| **Cast avatar** | 60px, no ring | 64px, 2px `outline_variant` ring — matches `w-16 h-16 ring-2` |
| **Cast gap** | 16px | 24px (`spacing.xl`) — matches `gap-6` |
| **See All** | `title_sm`, `see_all` gold | `label_sm`, bold, `primary` red — matches `text-xs text-primary font-bold` |
| **Similar gap** | 12px | 16px (`spacing.md`) — matches `gap-4` |
| **Back icon** | `chevron-back` | `arrow-back` — matches HTML's `arrow_back` |
